zh.lifeSummary: 當Hermann III. von Virneburg於1185年出生在荷蘭霍蘭時，他的父親Gottfried von Virneburg29歲，母親Frau Gottfried von Virneburg30歲。他和Liutgardis von Nassau至少有4個兒子和3個女兒。他去世於1254年享年69歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Hermann III. von Virneburg于1185年出生在荷兰霍蘭时，他的父亲Gottfried von Virneburg29岁，母亲Frau Gottfried von Virneburg30岁。他和Liutgardis von Nassau至少有4个儿子和3个女儿。他去世于1254年享年69岁。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Hermann
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

nameMeanings.name: III.
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Japanese Yuko, Aiko, Hideaki, Hiroki, Hiroyuki, Isamu, Kaoru, Katsumi, Keiichiro, Kenji, Masako, Masayuki.
Japanese: variously written, sometimes with characters used phonetically; the most probable meanings are 仁井 ‘benevolent well’, 新居 ‘new residence’, or 新井 ‘new well’. It is not common in Japan.

en.lifeSummary: When Hermann III. von Virneburg was born in 1185, in Holland, Netherlands, his father, Gottfried von Virneburg, was 29 and his mother, Frau Gottfried von Virneburg, was 30. He had at least 4 sons and 3 daughters with Liutgardis von Nassau. He died in 1254, at the age of 69.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Hermann III. von Virneburg est né en 1185, à Holland, Pays-Bas, son père, Gottfried von Virneburg, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Frau Gottfried von Virneburg, avait 30 ans. Il a eu au moins 4 fils et 3 filles avec Liutgardis von Nassau. Il est décédé en 1254, à l’âge de 69 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Hermann III. von Virneburg 1185 in Holland, Niederlande geboren wurde, war sein Vater Gottfried von Virneburg 29 und seine Mutter Frau Gottfried von Virneburg 30. Er hatte mit Liutgardis von Nassau mindestens 4 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb 1254 im Alter von 69 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Hermann III. von Virneburg è nato il nel 1185 nel Holland, Paesi Bassi, il suo padre, Gottfried von Virneburg, aveva 29 anni e il suo madre, Frau Gottfried von Virneburg, aveva 30 anni. Lui avuto almeno 4 figli e 3 figlie con Liutgardis von Nassau. Morì nel 1254, all'età di 69 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Hermann III. von Virneburgが1185年にオランダホーランドで生まれた時，父Gottfried von Virneburgは29歳，母Frau Gottfried von Virneburgは30歳であった。彼はLiutgardis von Nassauとの間に少なくとも4人の息子と3人の娘をもうけた。彼は1254年に69歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Hermann III. von Virneburg(이)가 1185년 네덜란드 홀랜드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Gottfried von Virneburg(은)는 29세였고, 그의 어머니 Frau Gottfried von Virneburg(은)는 30세였다. 그는 Liutgardis von Nassau(와)과 적어도 네 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1254년 69세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Hermann III. von Virneburg nasceu em 1185, em Holland, Países Baixos, seu pai, Gottfried von Virneburg, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Frau Gottfried von Virneburg, tinha 30 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 4 filhos e 3 filhas com Liutgardis von Nassau. Ele faleceu em 1254, com 69 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Hermann III. von Virneburg родился в 1185 г. в местности холланд, Нидерланды, его отцу по имени Gottfried von Virneburg было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Frau Gottfried von Virneburg, 30. У него было по крайней мере 4 сына и 3 дочери от Liutgardis von Nassau. Он умер в 1254 г. в возрасте 69 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Hermann III. von Virneburg nació en 1185, en Holland, Países Bajos, su papá, Gottfried von Virneburg, tenía 29 años y su mamá, Frau Gottfried von Virneburg, tenía 30 años. Tuvo por lo menos 4 hijos y 3 hijas con Liutgardis von Nassau. Murió en 1254, a la edad de 69 años.
